revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

A general area or large patch of light of roughly uniform brightness, directly behind an AtoN light, that impairs the mariner’s view of the AtoN light of interest.





Source: ENG7, Guideline G1073
